# imageProvider

**Instance Property**

The image to display.

## Declaration

```swift
@NSCopying var imageProvider: CLKFullColorImageProvider { get set }
```

## Discussion

This image provider produces a full-color image.

## Setting the Complication Data

- **textProvider**: The header text to display in the complication.
